code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ j: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn find_key(_ blob: String, _ token: String) -> Int
  let n = string.len(blob)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut idx = 0
  mut result = -1
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(blob, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 10
      if result == -1
        let seg = string.substring(blob, start, i)
        if seg == token
          result = idx
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
      idx = idx + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut keys_blob: String = ""
  mut counts: List<Int> = []
  mut num_keys = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut tok_start = -1
  while i <= n
    mut b = -1
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(x)
        b = x
      when None
        b = -1
      end
    end
    let boundary = if i == n
      true
    else
      is_ws(b)
    end
    if boundary
      if tok_start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, tok_start, i)
        let idx = find_key(keys_blob, tok)
        if idx == -1
          keys_blob = "#{keys_blob}#{tok}\n"
          counts = list.push(counts, 1)
          num_keys = num_keys + 1
        else
          mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
          mut j = 0
          while j < num_keys
            mut v = get_at(counts, j)
            if j == idx
              v = v + 1
            end
            new_counts = list.push(new_counts, v)
            j = j + 1
          end
          counts = new_counts
        end
        tok_start = -1
      end
    else
      if tok_start == -1
        tok_start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut best_idx = -1
  mut best_count = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < num_keys
    let v = get_at(counts, j)
    if v > best_count
      best_count = v
      best_idx = j
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut result_tok: String = ""
  let blen = string.len(keys_blob)
  mut k = 0
  mut kstart = 0
  mut kidx = 0
  while k < blen
    mut b2 = 0
    match string.byte_at(keys_blob, k)
    when Some(x)
      b2 = x
    when None
      b2 = 0
    end
    if b2 == 10
      if kidx == best_idx
        result_tok = string.substring(keys_blob, kstart, k)
      end
      kstart = k + 1
      kidx = kidx + 1
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  println("top=#{result_tok}=#{best_count}")
end
